findings.message: Mutation parameter 'description' is accepted but not used in the implementation. The mutation signature declares 'description: str' but the call to repository.create_item() only passes 'name', ignoring the description parameter entirely. This breaks the contract between the GraphQL schema and its resolver.
findings.suggestion: Either remove the 'description' parameter from the mutation signature if it should not be supported, or pass the 'description' argument to repository.create_item() if it should be persisted. Update repository.create_item() to accept and handle the description parameter accordingly.
